summary: Completed comprehensive testing of real-time multiplayer chess app with brown/cream board colors and Web Audio API sound effects. All core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Frontend home page loads and create game functionality works
Username modal appears and accepts input correctly
Chess board renders with correct brown (#B58863) and cream (#F0D9B5) colors
Game state management and real-time updates via Socket.IO
Chat and Moves tabs are functional and clickable
Player info, game status badge, and reset button all present and working
Multiplayer functionality - two players can join and are assigned white/black correctly
Web Audio API available and sound effects module loads without errors
Room ID badge displays correctly and is clickable
Back home button present and functional
CORS headers properly configured for cross-origin requests

success_percentage.sound_effects: 100% (Web Audio API available, no JS errors)
